title: HIPAA 164.312(b) — Endpoint Posture Compliance Evidence on Healthcare Endpoints

compliance.assurance_rationale: HIPAA 164.312(b) — audit controls. Posture compliance evidence proves that healthcare endpoints accessing PHI meet baseline security posture requirements.
compliance.controlObjective: Demonstrate that healthcare endpoints (clinical workstations, mobile devices used for PHI access) meet posture compliance baselines before being granted PHI-bearing network access.
compliance.evidenceArtifact: Saved search 'UC-22.10.58' archiving posture compliance evidence to `audit_evidence` with `hipaa_clause=164.312(b)`.

dataSources: `index=nac sourcetype=cisco:ise:syslog` Posture codes 80001-80003. Cross-reference UC-17.1.21 and UC-17.1.53.
app: Splunk Enterprise Security (263) + Splunk Add-on for Cisco Identity Services (1915).
spl:
index=nac sourcetype="cisco:ise:syslog" MessageCode IN (80001, 80002, 80003) earliest=-1d
| lookup healthcare_endpoint_inventory.csv endpoint_mac OUTPUT phi_relevant
| where phi_relevant="yes"
| stats count by posture_status, MessageCode
| eval hipaa_clause="164.312(b)", control="Posture_Compliance"
| collect index=audit_evidence
description: We continuously evidence HIPAA 164.312(b) — posture compliance for healthcare endpoints accessing PHI-bearing networks.
value: HIPAA requires audit controls over PHI-access endpoints. Posture compliance per ISE is the technical control; this UC produces evidence of its operation.
implementation: Schedule the saved search daily at 06:00 local time; archive results to the `audit_evidence` summary index for NIST 800-53 Rev. 5 evidence.
visualization: HIPAA posture compliance panel; non-compliant healthcare endpoints table.
knownFalsePositives: 1. Posture-grace-period endpoints — annotate with grace expiry.
detailedImplementation:
## Prerequisites

- UC-17.1.21 + UC-17.1.53 operational.
- `healthcare_endpoint_inventory.csv` maintained.

## Step 1-5

```ini
[UC-22.10.58: HIPAA — Posture Evidence]
cron_schedule = 0 6 * * *
actions = summary_index
action.summary_index._name = audit_evidence
action.summary_index.marker = uc=22.10.58,reg=HIPAA,clause=164.312(b)
```
grandmaExplanation: We continuously evidence HIPAA 164.312(b) — posture compliance for healthcare endpoints accessing PHI. That is important for the audit, where proof needs to line up with what the rules expect.

controlTest.positiveScenario: Healthcare endpoint fails posture. Evidence captured.
controlTest.negativeScenario: All healthcare endpoints compliant. Empty result; control attested.

evidence: Saved search archived to `audit_evidence` with HIPAA 164.312(b) tagging.
